title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates:
Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates!
